mnemonics.title: Transfer Learning
mnemonics.content: Transfer learning is like learning to ride a bike. Once you know how to ride a bike, you can ride any bike, even if it's a different color or has a different seat.

mnemonics.title: Fine-Tuning
mnemonics.content: Fine-tuning is like adjusting the seat on a bike. You're making small adjustments to something that already works well.

mnemonics.title: Feature Extraction
mnemonics.content: Feature extraction is like taking a picture of a bike. You're capturing the important features of the bike, but you're not changing the bike itself.

acronyms.usage: TL is a technique used in machine learning to leverage knowledge from one task to improve performance on another related task.
FT involves adjusting the weights of a pretrained model to fit a new task.
FE involves using a pretrained model to extract features from data, which can then be used to train a new model.

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a person riding a bike. The person is like the model, and the bike is like the task. When the person learns to ride a bike, they can ride any bike, even if it's a different color or has a different seat.

Imagine a person adjusting the seat on a bike. The person is like the model, and the seat is like the weights of the model. When the person adjusts the seat, they're making small adjustments to something that already works well.

Imagine a person taking a picture of a bike. The person is like the model, and the picture is like the features of the data. When the person takes a picture of the bike, they're capturing the important features of the bike, but they're not changing the bike itself.

analogies.analogy: Learning to ride a bike is like learning to play a musical instrument. Once you know how to play one instrument, you can learn to play other instruments more easily.
Adjusting the seat on a bike is like adjusting the strings on a violin. You're making small adjustments to something that already works well to get the best sound.
Taking a picture of a bike is like taking a picture of a sunset. You're capturing the important features of the scene, but you're not changing the scene itself.
